title: (ja, en, es, Viet, De) 사랑하는 사람과 좋은 관계를 오래 유지하려면 | 문요한 정신건강의학과 전문의 | 사랑 관계 연애 | Ask N Learn 19회
text: Hello, I'm Moon Yohan, a psychiatrist and author of "Otium" Good friendship, and even at this moment, it's not easy to continue a loving relationship I see a case where you can't continue to love for a long time and compare it to a book Let's say you bought this book because you were curious seeing the cover and the table of contents That is what I define 'dating' someone But love is the process of reading and understanding the content thoroughly A lot of people don't read the book after buying it The bigger problem is that even though they didn't read the book, they think they know what the book is about In other words, the book in here is called "The Counterpart", thinking that you understand the person well is a dangerous factor when you're in a deep relationship So everyone can date, but not everyone can love Only those who have the ability to continue their love, can develop their love furthermore So if you say that love is an 'ability', there are four important factors to achieve this ability of love If we have these four elements, we can develop our relationship into 'love' and can continue to love more deeply First, I think the most important thing is the respect of individuality In terms of relationships with others, we don't have issues when that person and I have different ideas or thoughts Because we naturally know that the person and I are different people But the problem happens when you get close to someone, we hope that the other person feels the same way as me, also think like me and hope the other person will act according to my expectations And even if I don't say it, we hope the other person will know what I want And wish that they'll always be on my side if something happens These kind of thoughts - wishing that they will be same as me - capture our mind But what happens when that kind of mind grows? You'll continue to be disappointed, frustrated, and angry So people who have the ability to continue their love, don't forget the other person is an independent individual that has a different heart even if the relationship gets closer And those who maintain their individuality can continue to love Let me tell you about my case A year ago, my wife had a big flu My wife couldn't eat

title: (ja, en, es, Viet, De) 사랑하는 사람과 좋은 관계를 오래 유지하려면 | 문요한 정신건강의학과 전문의 | 사랑 관계 연애 | Ask N Learn 19회
text: s an independent individual that has a different heart even if the relationship gets closer And those who maintain their individuality can continue to love Let me tell you about my case A year ago, my wife had a big flu My wife couldn't eat and was lying down On my way home, there was a beef bone soup place I thought my wife probably would have starved all day, so if I buy a bowl of beef bone soup, it would give her more energy, so I bought beef bone soup I went to home and boiled it and I told to my wife to come out and try it But my wife said she doesn't want to eat it I told her again to at least try some soup So my wife finally came out, but instead said she couldn't eat the beef bone soup and went back in I should've stopped then but instead I said, "I bought it for you, why can't you just take a bite?" My wife turned around and told me, "Why are you giving me a hard time?" I was really upset when I heard that, too I definitely made an effort But in the end it turned out to be bad, and both of them were hurt If you look at it in a way, these things happen very often in relationships The same goes for relationships between friends What should I have done? If you respect the other person's individuality, if I hadn't missed the other person's feelings and my feelings were different, I would have called her and asked how she feels, what she ate today Then, I should've asked, "Should I buy something?" So 'respecting individuality' means to understand that they are different from how you feel and not miss out on ourselves, and what we both want On those premises that it might not be exactly the same, paying attention to the other person's feelings is truly called respecting individuality Second is the ability to say what you want It's an important part of the ability to continue love When I say this, there are times when many people think it's a bad idea to tell the other person what they want Some people think they are a bit selfish There are people who think it's something that hurt their pride And as I said before, even if the other person doesn't say it, they want their partners to notice automatically These kinds of mindsets is why we don't tell others what we want But actually, because I don't talk much, the other person would't know what I want, and eventually they keep exchanging the wrong things So in order to have a healthy love, You need to be able to ask others for what you want That request doesn't mean you're complaints You

title: (ja, en, es, Viet, De) 사랑하는 사람과 좋은 관계를 오래 유지하려면 | 문요한 정신건강의학과 전문의 | 사랑 관계 연애 | Ask N Learn 19회
text: lk much, the other person would't know what I want, and eventually they keep exchanging the wrong things So in order to have a healthy love, You need to be able to ask others for what you want That request doesn't mean you're complaints You have to focus on saying what you want For example, on our 50th, 100th day, we keep giving gifts to each other But the other person only takes and doesn't even try to celebrate... If your partner won't care, you need to tell what you want "Just like how I'm celebrating an anniversary with you, I want you to take care of me on my anniversary, too." This part where you ask clearly what you want is very important among the skills when continuing love This is not selfish at all In order to have a good relationship and a loving relationship, I think it's a consideration for both me and the other person But the important thing here is that no matter who they are, There's no one who can change just because you talked once about it So, I think we need to talk about it seriously at least three times But you shouldn't think this is getting angry Instead, I have to be calm and tell the person what I want And even though I said it more than three times, if the other person doesn't show any change, We need to think about that relationship Because you can say that the other person doesn't respect me The third one is very important 'Conflict resiliency' is a very important factor in love's ability If there's a conflict, a lot of you try to avoid it or try to beat the other person, and this can lead to a fight In fact, some people who are good at love look at conflicts as a kind of a tuition fee for love So in order for us to get closer, It's an inevitable process that you can't help but go through So instead of trying to avoid it, you should try to understand why there's a conflict So, people who have the ability to love also have the ability to understand conflict They know that it's not to beat the other person And don't think it's dangerous but rather think it's a chance to understand the other person better So they don't think the other person is the problem But think that we communicated faintly, or think that it happened because of our differences Eventually they will open their hearts and look what their problems and try to talk about it The ability to resolve conflicts... You need to resolve conflicts in order for your relationship to go one step further Many of you don't talk about what I had a hard time

title: (ja, en, es, Viet, De) 사랑하는 사람과 좋은 관계를 오래 유지하려면 | 문요한 정신건강의학과 전문의 | 사랑 관계 연애 | Ask N Learn 19회
text: n their hearts and look what their problems and try to talk about it The ability to resolve conflicts... You need to resolve conflicts in order for your relationship to go one step further Many of you don't talk about what I had a hard time with, and just let it go or prove that I did better until the end, and make a big fight out of it until the relationship falls apart So... It's not about winning I want to say that understanding each other is very important Lastly, the most necessary thing in the ability of love is the interest in the other person's happiness and ideals A good relationship means that we become "Us" When you fall in love, this "Us" will definitely grow Then what will happen to 'me' and 'you'? Will it get smaller? That's not true Good relationships, good love help us to grow, I get bigger, you get bigger, we all get bigger That's why good love is literally a growing relationship So after you met this person and you realize that you have improved, and feel like you're becoming a better person, it means that this love will be very powerful and last longer So people who continue to have a good relationship not only share daily conversations but also talk about their future dreams, goals, and ideals Like, "What do you want to do in five years?" or "What kind of house do you want to live in? If you quit this job now, What else do you want to do?" "When are you happy?"' "How do you feel loved when I do it for you?", etc When the other person pays attention to each other's ideals, happiness, and goals, That relationship will develop and eventually both will like it "We" are able to move on to a good relationship, so... You have to learn love and train And in order to build up that strength, you have to practice just like exercising 번역: 세바시 열린크루 2기 박채린
